title: The Fresh Experience
description: A fun Vanilla-Styled Modpack that Revamps the Survival Experience using Additive as a base for Awesome Performance
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36f60c542f3f2477f1de1d9ffbc0a01844a13a2a.png)

This modpack combines various vanilla-friendly mods that make the overall experience feel like a revamped version of the vanilla game. From overhauling key game mechanics to adding some new ones, the overall experience is different, but still is Minecraft at its heart.

It is based on many games I find interesting, like the **Dark Souls** games and **Sea of Thieves**. It also uses the Additive Modpack as a base for better performance. 

Definitely a fun modpack to play with friends to bring the magic of Minecraft back into the modern version.

P.S. If you want to play on a server, all the mods needed for the server are denoted by an [s]
